name: Acrylic Round Desktop Organizer - Threshold™
description:
Organize your workspace with this Acrylic Round Desktop Organizer from Threshold™. This acrylic desktop organizer has an easy see-through design, making it easy to find the contents while lending modern charm. Designed with four compartments, this round desktop organizer offers enough space for writing utensils and other office supplies.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
